hero.body: The premium workspace for moodboards, style guides, and creative inspiration. Built for designers who care about every detail.

collage.title: Rose & Azure Mood
collage.noteBody: Soft rose tones meet cool azure — delicate, dreamy, character-driven.

design.label: Design
design.title: Intuitive Layouts
design.desc: Drag and drop elements to compose the perfect board for your creative vision.

ai.label: AI
ai.title: AI Inspiration
ai.desc: Generate palettes and style suggestions directly from your moodboard content.

collab.label: Collab
collab.title: Seamless Sharing
collab.desc: Share your boards with anyone and collaborate in real-time on mood creation.
